## Summary

Describe the change in 2-5 short lines.

## Why this change

Explain the reason for the change and the problem it solves.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run build:frontend`
- [ ] `npm run eval:production`
- [ ] `npm run test:backend` if backend behavior changed

## Privacy and safety check

- [ ] no secrets or tokens added
- [ ] no personal health data added
- [ ] no private workspace URLs or identifiers added
- [ ] docs and screenshots are safe for a public repository

## Notes for reviewers

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to?
